title: Myers Park Manor
description: An elegant brick manor on a tree-lined street in Charlotte's most prestigious neighborhood. Soaring ceilings, a chef's kitchen, and manicured grounds embody the quintessential Myers Park lifestyle.

title: Lake Norman Waterfront Estate
description: A stunning lakefront retreat with breathtaking sunset views over Lake Norman. Private dock, resort-style pool, and an open-concept interior designed for effortless lakeside entertaining.

title: SouthPark Sky Residence
description: A sophisticated high-rise residence in the heart of SouthPark with panoramic city views, floor-to-ceiling windows, and a designer kitchen rivaling the area's finest restaurants.

title: Dilworth Craftsman Estate
description: A beautifully restored craftsman home in one of Charlotte's most walkable neighborhoods, featuring original character details paired with a thoughtfully modernized interior.

title: Ballantyne Reserve Estate
description: A masterpiece of new construction within an exclusive Ballantyne enclave. Custom millwork, a spa-caliber primary suite, and a heated pool anchor this exceptional turnkey offering.

title: Uptown Crown Residences
description: Sophisticated urban living at the center of Uptown Charlotte. Floor-to-ceiling glass, concierge services, and a rooftop terrace make this a premier lock-and-leave address.

title: Eastover Heritage Estate
description: A landmark estate in Charlotte's storied Eastover neighborhood on a double lot. This classical revival home offers formal entertaining spaces, a guest cottage, and a serene walled garden.

title: Cornelius Lakeshore Cove
description: A modern farmhouse steps from Lake Norman in the sought-after Peninsula community. White oak floors, Thermador appliances, and a covered terrace made for lakeside evenings.

title: Marvin Grand Manor
description: An exceptional estate on two acres of manicured grounds in Marvin's most coveted gated community. A wine cellar, home theater, and resort pool complete this turn-key sanctuary.

title: NoDa Loft Collection
description: Industrial-chic loft living in Charlotte's artisan NoDa district. Exposed concrete, soaring ceilings, and a private rooftop terrace in the city's most vibrant and creative neighborhood.

title: Waxhaw Heritage Manor
description: A gracious estate with European-inspired architecture on a private cul-de-sac in Waxhaw. Stone exterior, barrel-vaulted loggia, and three acres of grounds with a resort-style pool and spa.

title: Plaza Midwood Modern
description: A stunning new build in the heart of Plaza Midwood blending bold modern architecture with neighborhood character. Rooftop terrace, chef's kitchen, and a private courtyard garden.
